document.title: MI63-02983A SHEET-E2X_FRONT_DECOSHEET approval document
document.documentType: Part approval document with specification, inspection data, control plan, packing method, reliability test report, outgoing inspection sheet, and inspection criteria

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval package for Samsung part MI63-02983A, SHEET-E2X_FRONT_DECOSHEET, model S4343-AW, supplied by Hansung P&I.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports part approval, quality control, inspection, hazardous substance screening, reliability testing, and packing specification for the front deco sheet part.
keyPoints: Document code and SEC code are MI63-02983A with Revision 00.
Part description/name is SHEET-E2X_FRONT_DECOSHEET and applicable model is S4343-AW.
Inspection criteria include appearance, width and length 455.40 ±0.3 mm, and XRF hazardous substance checks.
The process quality control plan identifies SOP category and includes receiving inspection, printing, lamination, cutting, product inspection, packing, and outgoing inspection.
The reliability test report records a high-temperature/high-humidity test with Pass result.

entities.name: Samsung Electronics Co.
entities.evidence: This is the asset of Samsung Electronics Co. and it is prohibited from copying and application without permission.

entities.name: Health&Medical Equipment DR R&D Group
entities.evidence: PROPOSAL DIVISION: Health&Medical Equipment DR R&D Group

concepts.name: 00Q2-0083K restricted substances requirement
concepts.evidence: This parts should not contain any substances which are specified in 00Q2-0083K

concepts.name: DUQ1-0022K part quality assurance work rule

evidence.claim: The document code is MI63-02983A.
The document revision is 00.
The document includes ED00.
The E.D date is 22-10-2018.
The part description is SHEET-E2X_FRONT_DECOSHEET.
The model is S4343-AW.
The vendor code is DJ06.
The approval review conclusion was approved and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 결   론,  승 인 함,,,    판   정,합 격

evidence.claim: The material review states matte PC 0.254T.
The CTF inspection specification for width and length is 455.40 with ±0.3 tolerance.
The CTF inspection data records Cp values of 3.41 and 3.65 and Cpk values of 3.39 and 3.57.
The part must not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
evidence.evidenceText: This parts should not contain any substances which are specified in 00Q2-0083K

evidence.claim: The control plan category is SOP.
evidence.evidenceText: Control Plan Category,,,,”□ DVS, □ PVS, □ PRS, ■ SOP”

evidence.claim: The PQCP document number is HS18-0814-01-PQCP.
The PQCP revision date is 2019-01-04 version 01.
Product inspection in the control plan includes dimensional inspection at 455.40*455.40±0.3mm.
The reliability test purpose was high-temperature/high-humidity testing and the result was Pass.
The reliability test conditions were 50℃, 95% humidity, and 24 hours.
The reliability test period was 2018-08-11 to 2018-08-14.
The packing unit is 1 BOX × 10PACK × 500 = 5,000 EA.
Outgoing inspection states the lot satisfied the company's outgoing inspection regulation and quality is guaranteed.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 검사 LOT는 당사 출하검사 규정에 만족하며 이에 품질을 보증합니다.

evidence.claim: The inspection method references DUQ1-0022K.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is not a government regulator or jurisdiction; the source indicates Samsung Electronics Co. ownership/customer context and internal standards.
Multiple dates appear in the package, including E.D DATE 22-10-2018, written date 2018.08.14, EC History date 10/22/18, PQCP revision date 2019-01-04, and reliability test dates.
The source is a combined preprocessed spreadsheet export with mixed Korean and English text and CSV-like layout.
